title: Magnetic Scores

content.value: Combining visual inscriptions with magnetic ones — scores that can be both read and haptically experienced through magnetic interactions.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}

paper.title: The Magnetic Score: Somatosensory Inscriptions and Relational Design
